ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film or TV show */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of release */,
  "credit" TEXT /* Credit associated with the film (e.g., character, guest star) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the film */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the film */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's trailer */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being rated */,
  "tomatometer_score" TEXT /* Tomatometer score for the film */,
  "audience_score" TEXT /* Audience score for the film */,
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the critic who provided the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, critic, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the credit */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person involved in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Character name if applicable */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person (e.g., actor, director) */,
  "order_of_appearance" INTEGER /* Order of appearance for the person in the film */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the person's role in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_credits_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_credits_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the person */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the person */,
  "wikipedia_url" TEXT /* URL of the person's Wikipedia page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_won" INTEGER /* Year when the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Actor, Best Director) */,
  "awarding_organization" TEXT /* Organization that awarded the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being viewed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views recorded */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the views were recorded */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the views were recorded (e.g., Streaming Service, Cinema) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the views were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_viewership_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the admin's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
